analysis: The project is a static website focused on black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The existing files include HTML structure, CSS styling, and JavaScript for interactivity. The theme should emphasize black holes, animated objects, and slides. The current CSS and HTML need enhancements to fully realize the black hole theme with animations and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with black hole-themed animations, including swirling effects, glowing elements, and animated slides. Add CSS variables for cosmic colors and gradients to create a cohesive dark theme.
Update the HTML to include sections for animated slides and interactive elements related to black holes. Ensure all sections are properly structured and mobile-friendly with a hamburger menu.

Complete the JavaScript to handle animations for black holes and slides, fix syntax errors, and ensure all interactive elements function correctly. Add event listeners for mobile menu toggling and slide navigation.
